description_long: This is a grave site featuring a prominent angel statue standing atop a stone pedestal at the head of the grave. The angel is depicted with wings outstretched and hands clasped, gazing downward in a solemn pose. The grave is bordered by a low stone frame and filled with a variety of plants and shrubs, some of which appear to be well-tended while others are more overgrown. The headstone is a large, rectangular slab of weathered stone, flanked by two smaller stone panels. The surrounding ground is covered with gravel and bordered by a concrete or stone perimeter. The overall appearance is one of reverence and tranquility, with the angel statue serving as a central focal point.
description: A grave site with a large angel statue atop a stone pedestal, bordered by a stone frame and filled with plants and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel statue, headstone, and the full grave plot with visible plants and stone border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the grave, the angel statue's profile, and the arrangement of greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headstone and the angel's wings, with less detail of the grave plot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angel statue's other profile and the grave's stone border and plant arrangement.
